title: A/B Testing Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps involved in designing, running, and analyzing an A/B test to compare two variants (A and B) of a product or feature.
elements: Randomly Assign Users (Control Group A, Treatment Group B)
relationships: Sequential flow from one step to the next, with a feedback loop from 'Make Data-Driven Decision' back to the start for potential follow-up tests
